steps.title: Recall the circumference formula
steps.content: In this formula, $C$ is the circumference and $d$ is the diameter.

steps.title: Substitute and solve for diameter
steps.content: We're given $C = 89\pi$ centimeters. Substituting into the formula: $$89\pi = \pi d$$ Divide both sides by $\pi$: $$d = 89$$ The diameter is 89 centimeters.
